class.name: ResonanceStaticScene
class.brief_description: Scene-level component holding the exported static geometry for bake and runtime.
class.description: ResonanceStaticScene holds the merged static geometry asset produced by Export Meshes to Steam Audio. The bake uses only this asset (excluding dynamic objects). At runtime, the static scene is loaded from this asset; static ResonanceGeometry nodes skip adding themselves when a valid asset is present. Multiple ResonanceStaticScene nodes in one level are supported: [ResonanceRuntime] loads each valid asset additively (same set again after [method ResonanceServer.reinit_audio_engine]). Probe bake invalidation hashes combine every such node’s asset and global transform so changing any pack can mark data outdated.

method.name: has_valid_asset
method.description: Returns true if static_scene_asset is assigned and valid. Used by bake and export to skip when no geometry is present.

members.member: The exported merged static mesh. Assigned automatically by Export Meshes to Steam Audio.
Scene name at export time (for reference).
Hash of geometry at last export. Used to skip re-export when unchanged. Assigned automatically.
